name: Rx.Collections

documentation.description: Instances of types and transformations that we get automatically when creating a new Rx type

generic_instantiations.name: From_List_Transformers
generic_instantiations.code: package From_List_Transformers is new Rx.Impl.Transformers (Typed_Lists, Typed);

generic_instantiations.name: Into_List_Transformers
generic_instantiations.code: package Into_List_Transformers is new Rx.Impl.Transformers (Typed, Typed_Lists);

generic_instantiations.name: List_Traits
generic_instantiations.code: package List_Traits is new Rx.Traits.Types (List, List, Identity, Identity);

generic_instantiations.name: Obs_Transformers
generic_instantiations.code: package Obs_Transformers  is new Rx.Impl.Transformers (Typed, Typed_Observables);

generic_instantiations.name: Observable_Traits
Valueless
generic_instantiations.code: package Valueless is new Impl.Transformers (Typed, Valueless.Typed);

formals.name: Typed
formals.code: with package Typed is new Rx.Impl.Typed (<>);
